backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the real estate backend with data types for Property and Inquiry, and functions to add, update, delete, query, filter, and sort properties, plus submit and retrieve inquiries.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented feature IDs to their titles, associated source files, component dependencies, and test IDs for the real estate web app.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with all application routes (Home, Listings, Property Detail, About, Contact, Admin, NotFound) wrapped in a shared Layout with Header, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the brand logo, quick navigation links, property type links, and contact information in a responsive four-column grid.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with a logo, desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, an Admin CTA button, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Image gallery component with a main 16:9 preview, previous/next navigation arrows, an image counter badge, and a scrollable thumbnail strip.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: A form component for submitting property inquiries with fields for name, email, phone, and message, including validation, submission via a mutation hook, and a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/PropertyCard.tsx: A card component that displays a property's image, type badge, title, location, square footage, and price with a link to the property detail page.
frontend/src/components/PropertyFormModa: A modal dialog for adding or editing a property, containing a form with fields for all property attributes and using add/update mutation hooks to persist changes.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A search bar component with property type, max budget, and location filters, supporting both a hero (overlay) and inline layout variant.
frontend/src/data/seedProperties.ts: Exports an array of four hardcoded seed property objects (two residential, two commercial) used to pre-populate the backend with sample data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching, searching, adding, updating, and deleting properties, as well as submitting and retrieving inquiries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens (colors, borders, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: Static About Us page displaying company stats, team member profiles, and core values for the Prime Properties real estate firm.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed views for managing property listings (add, edit, delete) and viewing submitted inquiries, using query hooks and a property form modal.
frontend/src/pages/AllListings.tsx: Property listings page that reads URL search params to initialize filters, supports searching/filtering by type, budget, and location, and displays results using PropertyCard components.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a general inquiry form (using propertyId=0) and an office information sidebar showing phone, email, address, hours, and a map placeholder.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner with search bar, a featured properties carousel fetched via useGetFeaturedProperties, and a 'Why Choose Us' section with icon cards.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: 404 Not Found page displaying a centered message with links to navigate back to Home or the Listings page.
frontend/src/pages/PropertyDetail.tsx: Property detail page that fetches a single property by ID, renders an image gallery, property metadata (type, price, location, description), and an inquiry form in a sidebar layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (navy, gold, cream, shadcn semantic colors), fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) describing the real estate website's features, architectural notes, image requirements, and existing implemented features across all pages and backend.
